task_completion.description: Create the required layers with correct colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the LibreCAD Layer List widget (usually on the right), there should be three specific layers visible: 'RAILS' with a blue color indicator, 'ROLLERS' with a yellow color indicator, and 'NOTES' with a white/black color indicator.

task_completion.description: Draw the inner and outer rails with end caps
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the main drawing area, there should be two concentric blue quarter-circle arcs (spanning 90 degrees, typically from the positive X-axis to the positive Y-axis). The ends of these arcs should be connected by straight blue lines to form a closed track.

task_completion.description: Draw 7 radial rollers connecting the rails
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the blue track, there should be 7 straight yellow lines radiating outwards from the center point. They must connect the inner arc to the outer arc and be evenly spaced at 15-degree intervals (including the very ends at 0 and 90 degrees).

task_completion.description: Add text labels for the radii
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text labels 'R1000' and 'R1800' should be visible in the drawing area, placed near their respective inner and outer arcs.

task_completion.description: Save the drawing to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD window title bar, a 'Save As' dialog, or a terminal verification step should show the file named 'conveyor_curve.dxf' being saved to the '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the LibreCAD GUI to create the drawing
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreCAD application open with active use of its drawing tools, command line (at the bottom of the GUI), or layer menus.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a Python script to bypass the CAD GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show the execution of a Python script (e.g., using ezdxf) to programmatically generate the DXF file without GUI interaction.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually write DXF code in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen opening a text editor (like nano or gedit) to manually paste or write raw DXF format code.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The drawing must be centered at the origin (0,0). The 'RAILS' layer must be Blue (color index 5) and contain two concentric arcs (radii 1000mm and 1800mm) spanning exactly 0 to 90 degrees, plus straight end caps. The 'ROLLERS' layer must be Yellow (color index 2) and contain exactly 7 radial lines (length 800mm) at 15-degree intervals (0, 15, 30, 45, 60, 75, 90). The 'NOTES' layer must be White/Black (color index 7) and contain the text 'R1000' and 'R1800' with a height of 50mm. The final output must be saved as 'conveyor_curve.dxf'.
